zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Whetenhall於1482年出生在英國時，她的父親William Whetenhall III25歲，母親Anne Cromer13歲。她於1511年8月6日與Thomas Wentworth在英國肯特易亞斯特 比可哈姆結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和9個女兒的父母。她埋葬在英國英格蘭肯特易亞斯特 比可哈姆。

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Whetenhall was born in 1482, in England, her father, William Whetenhall III, was 25 and her mother, Anne Cromer, was 13. She married Thomas Wentworth on 6 August 1511, in East Peckham, Kent, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 9 daughters. She was buried in East Peckham, Kent, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Whetenhall est née en 1482, à Angleterre, son père, William Whetenhall III, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Anne Cromer, avait 13 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Wentworth le 6 août 1511, à East Peckham, Kent, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 9 filles. Elleenterrée à East Peckham, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Whetenhallが1482年にイギリスで生まれた時，父William Whetenhall IIIは25歳，母Anne Cromerは13歳であった。1511年8月6日にイギリスケントエアスト ペックハムでThomas Wentworthと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と9人の娘の親であった。彼女はイギリスイギリスケントエアスト ペックハムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Whetenhall(이)가 1482년 영국에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Whetenhall III(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Anne Cromer(은)는 13세였다. 그녀는 1511년 8월 6일 영국 켄트 이스트 펙함에서 Thomas Wentworth(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 아홉 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 이스트 펙함에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Whetenhall родилась в 1482 г. в местности Англия, её отцу по имени William Whetenhall III было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Anne Cromer, 13. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Wentworth 6 августа 1511 г. в местности эаст пеккхам, кэнт, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 9 дочерей. Она была похоронена в местности эаст пеккхам, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания.
